response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, reported strong financial performance throughout the year with quarterly revenues of $12.3M, $14.1M, $11.8M, and $16.2M respectively, totaling $54.4M annually and representing an impressive 18% year-over-year growth. The company, which employs 342 people, demonstrated resilience and growth momentum across all four quarters despite market challenges.
